corporate-video-st-augustine.label: St. Augustine & Jacksonville
corporate-video-st-augustine.h1: Corporate Video Production in St. Augustine
corporate-video-st-augustine.tagline: A full production team — built to protect your time.
corporate-video-st-augustine.description: We've spent 10+ years helping businesses in Saint Augustine, FL create video content that aligns with their goals. From brand stories to training videos, we handle the strategy, planning, production, and execution.

st-augustine-photography.label: St. Augustine & Jacksonville
st-augustine-photography.description: Event coverage, headshots, and brand photography for businesses across Northeast Florida.

st-augustine-video-production.label: Video Production
st-augustine-video-production.tagline: Every First Sight Films service in one place — video and photography across Northeast Florida.
st-augustine-video-production.description: Every First Sight Films service in one place — event video, corporate video, brand films, social content, and commercial & event photography.

aboutus.label: Our Story
aboutus.tagline: St. Augustine storytellers with over a decade behind the lens.
aboutus.description: Diego and Trista Cerquera started First Sight Films with a simple mission: help local businesses tell their stories through video.

contact.label: Contact
contact.description: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
